data.title: Robinhood CEO frustrated as crypto market bill delayed again; staking unavailable in some jurisdictions.
data.description: The CEO of Robinhood Markets Inc. has called for the U.S. to lead in cryptocurrency policy as certain regions face obstacles in accessing staking and tokenized stocks. Vlad Tenev highlighted the popularity of staking on Robinhood but noted that it is restricted in areas due to legislative challenges. States like California, Maryland, New Jersey, and Wisconsin currently do not have access to staking on Robinhood due to state regulations. Additionally, Tenev expressed disappointment that while Robinhood's European clients can access tokenized stocks, customers in the U.S. cannot. Staking is a top feature request on the platform.

data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the total number of confirmed coronavirus cases worldwide has surpassed 10 million, with over 500,000 deaths. The United States remains the country with the highest number of cases, reaching over 2.5 million cases and 125,000 deaths. Brazil follows closely behind with over 1.3 million cases and 57,000 deaths. In terms of recoveries, over 5.5 million people have successfully recuperated from the virus globally. These numbers highlight the ongoing impact of the pandemic and the need for continued vigilance and preventative measures.

data.title: New: Lemon introduces Bitcoin-backed Visa card in Argentina, allowing users to lock up BTC to access peso credit lines without selling.
data.description: A new development in the crypto space sees the introduction of a Bitcoin-backed Visa credit card in Argentina by exchange Lemon. This innovative card allows users to lock up their BTC as collateral in order to access peso credit lines, all without having to sell their coins. This move aims to provide users with more financial flexibility while retaining ownership of their cryptocurrency assets.

data.title: LUNGevity is accepting research grant applications to advance lung cancer breakthroughs in detection, treatment, health equity.
data.description: Cutting-edge research initiatives are driving progress in the advancement of early detection, treatment, and health equity for lung cancer. An esteemed nonprofit organization, LUNGevity Foundation, based in Washington, is currently inviting applications for its 2026 research grants. This funding opportunity aims to support innovative projects in the field, contributing to the ongoing efforts to combat this prevalent disease. Interested parties are encouraged to apply and be part of the collective effort to enhance outcomes for individuals affected by lung cancer.

data.title: SUI set to hit $2.07-$2.42 by Feb 2026. Currently trades at $1.81 with RSI 59.33. Bulls need to hold $1.75 support.
data.description: The stock of SUI is currently valued at $1.81, with a neutral RSI of 59.33. Analysts predict a potential breakout to a range between $2.07 and $2.42 based on technical indicators, provided that the bulls can uphold support levels at $1.75 throughout February. This indicates a potential increase in value for SUI, signaling an opportunity for growth in the coming weeks.
